title: audit-handoff input spec
description:
Inputs to ``audit-handoff``.

All relpaths / the ``audit_id`` are resolved against ``--experiment-dir``.
The verb reads the ``audit_id``'s ``notebook-audit-config`` record (the
audit-open seat: intent + roots) and AST-scans the ``source`` ``.py``.

audit_id.description: The notebook decision-journal scope id (filesystem-safe slug) whose audit-open config/intent record is projected. Caller-authored.
audit_id.title: Audit Id

source.description: Experiment-relative path to the audited source .py (jupytext percent format) — AST-scanned for @register_run entry points and $HPC_RESULT_DIR write candidates.
source.title: Source

template.description: Experiment-relative path to the template .py the source was drafted from — carried verbatim into the draft audited_source block.
template.title: Template
